feed.title: radzki
feed.subtitle: Notes from computer engineering and hacking

entry.title: Reverse Engineering Philco PH32B51DSGWVB SMART TV

link.title: Reverse Engineering Philco PH32B51DSGWVB SMART TV

entry.summary: IPTV on Old TV? The goal here was to install SS-IPTV for my grandpa, so he could watch TV on his own to get a little less bored on this pandemic. This app allows you to watch IPTV (m38, m3u8) on your SmartTV. First, we get the original firmware from the manufacturer’s website: https://www.philco.com.br/site_o/index.php/indexs/drivers/ Type in your serial number and download it. Hands on ...

entry.title: Reverse Engineering Sagemcom F@ST 5302 (GVT, VIVO) [BR]
entry.summary: Sherlock Holmes Time Locating the UART on the board (positions): Looking at the PCB, you will see something like this: LEDS (FRONT) CPU HEAT SINK (4 pin UART) RX TX GND 3v3 YELLOW ETHERNET PORTS (BACK) CONNECTING Using an USB/TTL adapter or even an Arduino with RST shorted to GND you can connect to the board’s UART. screen -L /dev/ttyUSB0 115200...
